title: Driver bus number gating for location sharing

requirements.summary: Gate Driver Dashboard location sharing behind an initial bus number entry step when the driver has no bus number yet.
acceptanceCriteria: When a driver profile has no bus number (null/empty), the Driver Dashboard shows an editable 'Bus Number' input and a clear call-to-action (e.g., 'Save' / 'Register bus').
The 'Share Live Location' switch is disabled (and/or the location sharing card is replaced by an info prompt) until a bus number is successfully saved/registered.
All user-facing text related to this flow is in English.

file_operations.description: Add a 'bus number required' state to the Driver Dashboard: when the caller profile busNumber is empty, render a bus number entry form (Input + Button composed from existing shadcn/ui components; do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui) and prevent location sharing by disabling/hiding the share UI until a valid bus number is saved. Ensure all new labels, helper text, and prompts are English.

requirements.summary: Submit bus number from Driver Dashboard using the existing driver registration mutation and refresh cached profile/driver data for immediate UI unlock.
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the bus number from the Driver Dashboard calls the existing driver registration mutation (driverRegister) and shows success/failure feedback.
On success, the app refreshes the cached caller profile and driver data so the dashboard immediately displays the saved bus number and enables the 'Share Live Location' toggle.
If registration fails (e.g., bus number already registered or invalid length), the dashboard shows the error and does not enable location sharing.

file_operations.description: Enhance the existing useDriverRegister mutation to invalidate/refetch any driver-specific cached data that should update immediately after registration (in addition to currentUserProfile), so the Driver Dashboard can immediately reflect the saved bus number and related driver state without a hard reload.

Wire the new bus number form to the existing useDriverRegister mutation; add basic client-side validation (e.g., trimmed non-empty and a simple format/length check consistent with the app) and show success/failure feedback (toast and/or inline alert). On success, refetch/invalidate the caller profile query (and any relevant driver query) so the UI immediately shows the saved bus number and enables location sharing; on failure, keep sharing disabled and show the backend-provided error message.

requirements.summary: Cleanly handle the no-bus-number state in bus info and location sharing UI and ensure location updates only send when both sharing is enabled and a bus number exists.
acceptanceCriteria: When no bus number exists, the dashboard does not render an empty bus badge/value; instead it shows a clear placeholder/state.
The location update effect does not attempt to send updates when bus number is empty or sharing is off (no unnecessary updateLocation calls).
Once a bus number is set and sharing is toggled on, location updates proceed normally as before.

file_operations.description: Adjust Bus Information and Location Sharing UI rendering to avoid empty bus labels (e.g., no empty Badge or 'Bus ' strings when busNumber is empty). Replace with a clear placeholder and/or an informational prompt directing the user to register a bus number. Ensure the share toggle remains disabled when busNumber is empty, and add a defensive guard so location update mutations are never triggered unless both conditions are true: a bus number exists and sharing is enabled.
